endpoints.name: Autocomplete airport names. Returns a maximum of 10 airport names.
endpoints.description: Required parameters: airport_name, airport_service_type. Optional parameter: country code (ISO 3166-1).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{AIRPORT_NAME}} with a real airport_name.

endpoints.name: Search for airport by IATA code
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{AIRPORT_IATA}} with a real airport_iata.

endpoints.name: Search for airport by name
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{AIRPORT_NAME}} with a real airport_name.

endpoints.name: Search for airports by location
endpoints.description: Required parameters: result_count, latitude, longitude, airport_service_type
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LATITUDE}} with a real latitude. Replace {{LONGITUDE}} with a real longitude. Replace {{RESULT_COUNT}} with a real result_count.

endpoints.name: Country airports. Returns a list of airports for a country code(ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code)
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{COUNTRY_CODE}} with a real country_code.

endpoints.name: Country list. Returns a list of countries where airport data is available
endpoints.description: Country list. Returns a list of countries where airport data is available
